gold.title: Focus Rail
gold.reason: Stunning 3D card rail with depth, ambient background blur, drag-and-swipe, spring physics, and animated context panel. Directly usable for premium portfolios, product showcases, or immersive feature sections on marketing sites.

gold.title: Elegant Carousel
gold.reason: Editorial split-panel carousel with full-bleed imagery, accent-colored progress bars per slide, Ken Burns zoom, and touch support. Ideal for fashion lookbooks, luxury brand storytelling, or portfolio hero sections.

gold.title: Animated Carousel
gold.reason: 3D orbit carousel where images rotate in a cylinder with Framer Motion, pause-on-hover, and click-to-snap. Visually striking for photography studios, travel agencies, or any site needing a standout gallery hero.

gold.title: Interactive Scrolling Story Component
gold.reason: Full-page scroll-triggered feature reveal with sticky split-panel layout, smooth text transitions, and vertical image slider. Highly effective for SaaS landing pages, product feature walkthroughs, and storytelling sections.

gold.title: Horizontal Scroll Carousel
gold.reason: Scroll-hijacked horizontal card reveal using Framer Motion useScroll and useTransform with bold 450px image cards and text overlay. Perfect for case study sections, visual portfolios, and immersive landing pages.

gold.title: Circular Gallery
gold.reason: Auto-rotating 3D circular gallery synced to page scroll, with opacity depth falloff and glassmorphism card overlays. A head-turning centerpiece for portfolios, nature brands, or creative agencies.

gold.title: Scroll X Carousel
gold.reason: Composable scroll-driven horizontal carousel with a progress indicator, built on Framer Motion's useScroll and useTransform. Versatile primitive for building premium scroll-storytelling sections on any marketing site.

gold.title: Loading Carousel
gold.reason: Feature-rich autoplay carousel with text-scramble animation on slide change, progress bar, animated indicators, and configurable background tips overlay. High-quality, production-ready component for SaaS onboarding and feature announcement banners.

silver.title: Logo Carousel
silver.reason: Clean autoplay logo carousel with animated TextRoll title, configurable logo count, sizing props, and brightness inversion for dark mode. Standard but essential for 'Trusted By' sections on marketing sites.

silver.title: Progressive Carousel
silver.reason: Flexible headless carousel system with animated progress bars per slide and fast-forward transitions. Well-architected compound component pattern suitable for testimonial, feature, or image carousels.

silver.title: Carousel Circular Image Gallery
silver.reason: GSAP-powered circular clip-path reveal gallery with bounce animation and autoplay. Visually unique for photography or creative agency sites, though CDN-loaded GSAP dependency reduces plug-and-play convenience.

silver.title: Offer Carousel
silver.reason: Horizontally scrollable offer card carousel with hover lift animation, discount badge, brand logo footer, and contextual arrow navigation. Well-suited for e-commerce or travel booking landing pages.

silver.title: Story
silver.reason: Instagram/Facebook-style autoplay story component with progress bars, pause/play controls, and slide transitions. Useful for testimonials-as-stories, product launches, or social-style content sections.

silver.title: Carousel
silver.reason: Well-built generic carousel primitive with drag support, Framer Motion spring transitions, dot indicators, and external index control. High download count reflects broad utility; good base component for custom implementations.

silver.title: Ruler Carousel
silver.reason: Unique ruler-style brand carousel with animated spring-scroll, infinite looping, keyboard navigation, and prominent animated text labels. Creative approach for showcasing client brands or collections.

silver.title: Carousel
silver.reason: Embla-based carousel with autoplay, progress bar animation, dot navigation, and play/pause toggle. Solid, production-ready general-purpose carousel for image or content slides.

silver.title: Offers Carousel
silver.reason: Split-layout card with offer details on the left and a scrollable product card carousel on the right, with scroll-position-aware navigation arrows. Good for hotel, travel, or e-commerce promotional sections.

silver.title: Sparks Carousel
silver.reason: Horizontally scrollable card carousel with stagger-in animation on mount, scroll-aware arrow buttons, and hover scale on images. Competent content discovery or category showcase component.

bronze.title: Carousel
bronze.reason: Basic ark-ui carousel with previous/next controls and dot indicators using placeholder images. No animations, no visual polish — a bare-minimum starting point with minimal redesign value.

bronze.title: Carousel
bronze.reason: Simple thumbnail strip carousel using ark-ui with minimal styling. Functional but plain; no differentiation from a default browser implementation. Better alternatives exist in this set.

bronze.title: Carousel
bronze.reason: Standard Embla wrapper that replicates shadcn's default carousel API with minor button styling changes. Offers little beyond shadcn's own carousel component; too generic for redesign differentiation.

bronze.title: Onboarding Dialog
bronze.reason: Multi-step onboarding modal with animated dots and cross-fade. Primarily app-specific UX (SaaS onboarding flows) rather than a marketing carousel; limited use outside app interfaces.

bronze.title: Carousel
bronze.reason: Horizontal scroll carousel specifically designed for shareholder reports with gradient image overlays. Too domain-specific (investor relations pages) to be broadly useful in website redesigns.

bronze.title: Product Card
bronze.reason: Simple 3-item sliding product drop card inside a shadcn Card wrapper. Functional but basic, with CSS-only transform transition and no animations. Better suited as a dashboard widget than a marketing carousel.

bronze.title: Premium Process Timeline
bronze.reason: Step-by-step process timeline with phone mockup and animated progress line. Despite the 'carousel' categorization it functions as a tabbed process explainer — useful for agency sites but not a true visual carousel.

bronze.title: ProductCard
bronze.reason: Product color-variant switcher with hover image swap. More of a product micro-interaction component than a carousel; narrow e-commerce use case with no scrolling or slide functionality.
